name: koishi-plugin-rss-subscribe
description: 自用RSS订阅 - Koishi v4 RSS订阅推送插件，支持QQ官方机器人Markdown格式消息发送，定时抓取RSS源并推送新内容到指定群聊
author: ningmu

description.zh-CN: 自用RSS订阅 - 定时抓取RSS源并将新内容以QQ Markdown格式推送到指定群聊，支持Nitter/Twitter源适配、图床上传、源管理
description.en: Personal RSS subscription - Periodically fetch RSS feeds and push new content to QQ groups in Markdown format, with Nitter/Twitter source adaptation and image hosting
